reviews: Brought in my bent glasses expecting to be told they were beyond repair. The technician at Nayan Optics carefully heated and realigned the frame, restoring it to its original shape without a single scratch on the lenses. They did not even charge a hefty fee for it. Exceptional skill and genuine helpfulness.

My glasses had been sliding down my nose constantly for months. Walked into Nayan Optics and the technician fixed the problem in under five minutes. They adjusted the nose pads and temple arms perfectly. The glasses now sit securely without any discomfort. Such a simple fix but it has made a huge difference to my daily life.

A screw fell out of my favorite sunglasses and the arm was completely detached. Nayan Optics replaced the screw instantly, tightened the other hinges, and even gave the lenses an ultrasonic cleaning — all for free. The staff handled my expensive frame with great care. It feels like a brand new pair now.

The after-sales service at Nayan Optics is outstanding. Went in for a frame adjustment on glasses I had not even bought there and they helped me without any hesitation. The technician was professional and precise, making multiple small adjustments until the fit was absolutely perfect. This is the kind of service that builds loyal customers.

My child's glasses were completely bent out of shape after a fall. Took them to Nayan Optics not expecting much. The technician was patient and skilled, carefully working the frame back into shape without damaging the lenses. The glasses fit perfectly again and my child is happy. Wonderful service at no extra charge.

Had been suffering from headaches that I eventually traced back to my glasses sitting unevenly on my face. The optometrist at Nayan Optics identified the alignment issue immediately and made precise adjustments. The headaches stopped within a day. Such a small fix with such a big impact. Highly recommend their adjustment service.

The nose pads on my glasses had worn out and were causing discomfort. Nayan Optics replaced them with new silicone pads and adjusted the overall fit while they were at it. The whole process took about 10 minutes and the difference in comfort is remarkable. Great service and very reasonable pricing.

Stepped on my reading glasses and bent the frame badly. Was sure they were ruined. The technician at Nayan Optics worked on them for a few minutes and handed them back looking almost new. The lenses were undamaged and the frame sits perfectly. Saved me from having to buy a new pair. Incredibly skilled work.

The frame adjustment service at Nayan Optics is quick, precise, and genuinely helpful. Went in with glasses that were too tight behind the ears and left with a perfectly comfortable fit. The technician explained what they were doing and why, which I appreciated. No charge for the adjustment. Excellent customer care.

My glasses had developed a slight tilt that was causing eye strain. The team at Nayan Optics diagnosed the issue immediately and corrected the alignment in minutes. They also noticed a loose hinge I had not even mentioned and tightened it proactively. This kind of attention to detail is rare and very much appreciated.

The spring hinge on my glasses had broken and I thought the frame was finished. The technician at Nayan Optics had a replacement part and fitted it perfectly in minutes. The glasses work exactly as they should now. The service was fast, professional, and very reasonably priced. Highly recommend.

My glasses were giving me a red mark on my nose from the nose pads pressing too hard. Nayan Optics adjusted the nose pad angle and spacing in minutes and the problem was completely solved. The technician was knowledgeable and efficient. No charge for the service. This is what good after-sales care looks like.

Brought in my designer frames for a general tune-up and the technician at Nayan Optics did a thorough job. They tightened all the screws, adjusted the temple arms, cleaned the lenses ultrasonically, and checked the overall alignment. The frames feel brand new. Excellent service and they handled my expensive glasses with great care.

The arm of my glasses had become very loose and was flopping around. Nayan Optics tightened the hinge perfectly — not too tight, not too loose. The technician also noticed that one lens was slightly loose in the frame and secured it. The whole visit took less than 10 minutes. Brilliant service.

My glasses had been giving me a headache every afternoon and I could not figure out why. The optometrist at Nayan Optics spotted that the frame was slightly twisted, causing uneven lens positioning. After the adjustment, the headaches stopped completely. I am so grateful for their diagnostic skill.

Dropped my glasses and the frame got a small bend that was making them sit crookedly on my face. The technician at Nayan Optics fixed it in minutes with no charge. They also polished the lenses while they were at it. The glasses look and feel perfect now. This is the kind of service that keeps customers coming back.

The temple tips on my glasses had worn down and were scratching behind my ears. Nayan Optics replaced them with new rubber tips and adjusted the length at the same time. The difference in comfort is remarkable. The service was quick and completely free. Wonderful after-sales care.

My glasses had been sitting too low on my face, making me look over the top of the lenses rather than through them. The technician at Nayan Optics adjusted the nose pads to raise the frame to the correct position. It took about five minutes and the improvement is dramatic. Excellent service.

Brought in a pair of vintage frames that I had found and wanted to use with new lenses. The technician at Nayan Optics assessed them carefully, made some adjustments to ensure they would sit correctly, and fitted new lenses perfectly. The result is a beautiful, unique pair of glasses. Highly skilled work.

The frame adjustment service at Nayan Optics saved my favorite pair of glasses. The frame had warped slightly in the heat and was sitting unevenly. The technician heated and reshaped it perfectly, and also tightened all the screws while they were at it. The glasses are as good as new. Exceptional service.

My glasses had been causing discomfort behind my right ear for weeks. The technician at Nayan Optics identified that the right temple arm was slightly longer than the left and adjusted both to the correct length. The discomfort disappeared immediately. Such a simple fix that made a huge difference.

Came to Nayan Optics with glasses that had been sat on and had one arm pointing in completely the wrong direction. The technician worked on them patiently and had them looking almost new in about 10 minutes. The lenses were undamaged and the frame sits perfectly. Saved me from an expensive replacement.

The ultrasonic cleaning service at Nayan Optics is excellent. My glasses came out looking brand new — all the grime from the hinges and nose pads was completely removed. The technician also tightened all the screws while the glasses were in for cleaning. Wonderful service at a very reasonable price.

My child's glasses had been bent so many times that the frame was starting to show metal fatigue. The technician at Nayan Optics assessed the frame carefully and advised me on whether it was worth repairing or replacing. Their honest advice saved me from spending money on a frame that would not last.

The frame adjustment service at Nayan Optics is the best I have found in the city. The technician is skilled, thorough, and genuinely cares about getting the fit right. They made several small adjustments until the glasses were sitting perfectly. No charge for the service. Excellent after-sales care.

My glasses had developed a squeak every time I opened or closed them. The technician at Nayan Optics identified that the hinge was slightly dry and lubricated it properly. The squeak disappeared immediately and the hinge now moves smoothly. Such a small thing but it was driving me mad. Excellent service.

Brought in my glasses for a nose pad replacement and the technician at Nayan Optics went above and beyond. They replaced the nose pads, tightened all the screws, adjusted the temple arms, and cleaned the lenses ultrasonically. The glasses feel completely refreshed. Wonderful service.

The frame adjustment service at Nayan Optics is genuinely free and genuinely good. I have brought in glasses for adjustments three times now and each time the technician has been skilled, thorough, and helpful. This kind of after-sales care is rare and very much appreciated.

My glasses had been sitting at an angle because one of the nose pads had come off. The technician at Nayan Optics replaced both nose pads and adjusted the angle to ensure the glasses sat level. The difference is immediately noticeable. Excellent service and no charge.
